Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix stream FPS drop: fire-and-forget SCRN broadcast, no handler blocking

Root cause: awaiting broadcast_scrn_to_stream_clients() in the host handler
blocked processing of next SCRN frames. At 30fps (33ms/frame), any delay
caused frame pileup -> TCP backpressure -> host sender_loop blocked ->
PONG not sent -> server kicked host (code=1006) -> FPS drops to 0.

Fix: per-client sender task with single-slot latest frame queue.
- enqueue_scrn_to_stream_clients() is synchronous (never blocks handler)
- Each stream client gets a background sender coroutine
- Old frames are automatically dropped (latest-wins)
- Dead clients are cleaned up when send fails

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: bump version to v3.0.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: event catalog with summary tables and dashboard discovery

Implement event catalog feature to replace slow GROUP BY queries on raw events table with dedicated summary tables auto-populated via materialized views.

Step 0: Rename database placeholder from truesight_local to truesight across all ClickHouse migrations, scripts, and configs.

Step 1: ClickHouse migration (013_create_event_catalog.sql) creates:
- event_catalog table (AggregatingMergeTree) with event counts, first/last seen timestamps
- event_property_keys table (AggregatingMergeTree) for tracking property keys per event
- Two materialized views that auto-aggregate from events table
- Backfill and OPTIMIZE FINAL for existing data

Step 2: Admin-API handlers in event_catalog.rs:
- GET /v1/stats/projects/{pid}/event-catalog - searchable event listing with counts
- GET /v1/stats/projects/{pid}/event-catalog/{event_name}/properties - property key discovery

Step 3: Dashboard:
- New EventCatalogPage with searchable table, expandable rows for property inspection
- API types and functions for catalog/properties endpoints
- New hook (useEventCatalog, useEventProperties) with 60s staleTime
- Router and Sidebar integration with BookOpen icon
- Header breadcrumb/accent bar support

commit.message:
fix: address PR review — shared keymap, file:// URLs, always-notify config

- Extract shared VT key mapping data into lib/io/vt-keymap.ts as single
  source of truth; both vt.ts and main.ts now import from it, eliminating
  encoder drift between Deno and webview paths

- Fix loadTsConfig to convert absolute paths to file:// URLs for Deno
  dynamic import compatibility (handles both Unix and Windows paths)

- Fix watchTsConfig to use ?v= query param (not #fragment) for cache-busting

- Replace JSON.stringify diff in TypedConfig.invalidateAll with always-notify
  strategy — cheaper, no ordering/non-JSON brittleness

- Emit paneId as string (not Number cast) in ActionDispatcher to avoid
  bigint→number precision loss for large IDs

- Add explicit dispatch cases for command-palette, search, font-size-*
  actions so they are first-class UI actions (not extension passthrough)

commit.message:
fix: robust JSON repair with stack-based container closing

The old repairTruncatedJSON used counters and always closed brackets
before braces - wrong order when arrays are inside objects.

New approach uses a stack for correct LIFO closing order, progressive
truncation to find valid cut points, and always tries repair.

Add sub-expression syntax and expand test suite to 79 tests

- [ pkg method args ] groups into subexpr objects resolved in-process,
  avoiding JSON serialization boundary for rich JS values (SemVer, Date, etc.)
- Supports nesting: [ pkg method [ pkg2 method2 arg ] ]
- groupSubExpressions, evalSubExpr, resolveToken/resolveTokens pipeline
- dispatch() unified for both main call and sub-expression evaluation
- Tests: semver gt/satisfies with coerced versions, lodash head/uniq with
  sub-expression args, date-fns differenceInDays + addDays, ms as chunk size

Rework TLS to always-on per-component mTLS

- Rewrite gen-certs.sh to generate per-component certs and secrets
- Update K8s manifests with per-component secret names

commit.message:
Fix Product Gallery dialog: use withSyncEvent to prevent page refresh on WP 7.0 (#63570)

* Fix Product Gallery dialog: use withSyncEvent to prevent page refresh on WP 7.0

WordPress 7.0 makes data-wp-on actions async by default. The openDialog
action needs synchronous event access to call preventDefault(), otherwise
the browser follows the link before the action runs, causing a full page
refresh instead of opening the dialog.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add changelog

test(#564): Add search-semantic.tool.ts tests - 32 tests

Cover semantic search handler: tool definition, diagnose mode,

helper functions (truncateMessage, extractSnippet, interpretScore).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix internal writeback worker racing against external writeback API

When no provider adapters are configured (provider-agnostic mode), the
internal writeback worker was processing all queued writebacks as
noop-successes, dequeuing items before external consumers could poll
them via /writeback/pending.

Add ExternalWritebackMode StoreOption that, when enabled, prevents
internal writeback workers from starting so items remain in the queue
for external services to poll and ACK. Enabled by default in production
via RELAYFILE_EXTERNAL_WRITEBACK env var.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: correct ADS stripping off-by-one and remove stale pnpm-lock

The removeWindowsADS method used lastIndexOf which stripped one char
too many for single-colon ADS paths. Replaced with indexOf(':', 2) to
handle both single and double-colon ADS while preserving drive letters.

commit.message:
Add pentatonic vs extended scale note ring visualization

In browse mode, all in-scale notes now show colored rings:
- White ring: core pentatonic note
- Gold ring: note added beyond the pentatonic base
  (Natural Minor adds 2nd + b6 over Minor Pentatonic,
   Major adds 4th + maj7 over Major Pentatonic,
   Blues adds b5 over Minor Pentatonic)

インセプションデッキの整合性修正と人的資本経営フレーミング

- スプリント期間を全ドキュメントで1か月に統一（kickoff.html除く）

- 127258 Magnetic Variation: source, date, variation in rad

commit.message:
feat: ERC-8004 (Trustless Agents) — on-chain identity, reputation, validation

New `tempo-x402-erc8004` crate with sol! bindings for three ERC-8004
registries (identity, reputation, validation). Adds EIP-191 personal_sign
to the wallet crate for recovery proofs. Integrates into the node with
auto-mint on startup, background reputation submission from x402 settlements,
and soul tools for checking reputation and updating metadata.

Build optimization: alloy "full" feature replaced with specific features,
soul + agent deps feature-gated in node crate for lighter builds.

commit.message:
fix: cast DateTime64(3) to DateTime for windowFunnel aggregate

ClickHouse 25.x windowFunnel() doesn't accept DateTime64 directly; it requires
DateTime, Date, or unsigned integer. Cast server_timestamp to DateTime before
passing to windowFunnel to fix: 'Illegal type DateTime64(3) of first argument
of aggregate function windowFunnel'.
